name: Detective very platonic
description:
No one should be allowed to take away youth from young people.

Very big TW on Rape/assault and maybe human trafficking.

If you have a trauma with this or some unresolved issue please be careful with this or just don't use it.

Scenario:You have a long history of sexual abuse, luckily you were rescued a couple of days ago and now you have to deal with the interrogations, therapies and investigations on the case. Luckily for you, Adler seems to see you as a person rather than just a number or pawn in solving the case.

OMG HII, This bot could be part of a serie boutpoliec/detectives/etc I'm doing, but I don't want to brag too much because I never really finish the series I do and I leave them halfway. Anyway, I'm guaranteed to make an Ajax bot, also platonic but maybe more angst.

I literally fell asleep like 3 times trying to write the first message, I don't really like it, but otherwise I would never finish thizz. But again I didn't find a photo I liked so I used that one.

This idea is a bit strong but I tried not to specify too much what the user went through so that everyone can choose the degree of trauma or angst. This idea also came up while talking to a friend (HI POOKIE) about Ash's relationship with Max Lobo from banana fish, So I guess it's a bit inspired by the show.

I want to say more things but I didn't download enough headers to continue so I'm leaving now, I hope you like itttt
creator: Pinkypromisekisses
